_comment: Stage-3e seed-catalog states (DECISIONS §7). The core matrix is expressions x poses x the character's wardrobe. Editable data: each entry is an id + a booru-style prompt fragment appended to the identity prompt. Fragments are canonical Danbooru tags (5.5g 3g audit — the checkpoint is Illustrious-family and booru-conditioned). Neutral/adult by design; every fragment still passes the Layer-1 prompt gate at assembly.
